description_long: This object consists of three large, cylindrical wooden barrels with vertical staves and dark metal hoops reinforcing the top and bottom edges. The barrels are open at the top, revealing a hollow interior, and two circular wooden lids are visible, one leaning against a barrel and another lying flat on the ground. The wood is a rich brown color with visible grain, and the metal bands are a dark, matte gray. One barrel is lying on its side, showing the thickness of the wooden staves and the construction of the base. The barrels have no visible handles or markings, and their robust build suggests they are designed for storage or transport of goods. The overall appearance is rustic and utilitarian, suitable for urban or industrial settings.
description: A group of three large, open-topped wooden barrels with dark metal hoops and two removable wooden lids, showing a rustic and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Three upright wooden barrels, one with a lid leaning against it and another lid lying flat nearby.
description_view_1: All three barrels are upright, with one barrel partially obscured and the lids less visible.
description_view_2: One barrel is lying on its side, exposing the interior and base, with both lids clearly visible on the ground.
description_view_3: Two barrels are upright, one is on its side, and both lids are visible, one in the foreground and one near the barrels.
